title: Curoflow - Digital Care Pathway Platform
problem: Care pathways are fragmented. Patients move between providers without coordination, leading to gaps in care and poor patient experience.
solution: Digital platform connecting care providers with unified care pathways, patient communication, and progress tracking across the care journey.
technology: Care pathway orchestration, patient app, provider dashboard
target_customer: Healthcare providers, pharmaceutical companies (patient support programs)
varden_fit: High — care pathway orchestration complements Varden's marketplace. Could help coordinate care across Varden's clinic network.
notes: Care coordination infrastructure. Relevant for multi-provider marketplace.
